---
title: "Content Collection"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
#| label: knit-setup

# Runs at knit time (no `context:`). Sources helpers and reads
# `collection.json` so the chrome below can render statically and be
# present before Shiny boots — the page no longer briefly shows Quarto's
# generic "Content Collection" title.

library(jsonlite)

.source_helper <- function(name) {
  candidates <- c(name, file.path("..", "R", name))
  for (p in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(p)) { source(p); return(invisible(p)) }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot find helper file: %s", name))
}
.source_helper("icons.R")
.source_helper("render.R")

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || (length(a) == 1 && is.na(a))) b else a

knit_config <- tryCatch(
  jsonlite::read_json("collection.json", simplifyVector = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("No collection.json: ", e$message); list() }
)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| context: server-start
#| label: server-setup

library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)
library(shiny)

.source_helper <- function(name) {
  candidates <- c(name, file.path("..", "R", name))
  for (p in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(p)) { source(p); return(invisible(p)) }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot find helper file: %s", name))
}
.source_helper("icons.R")
.source_helper("render.R")
.source_helper("connect_api.R")

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || (length(a) == 1 && is.na(a))) b else a

connect_server <- sub("/$", "", Sys.getenv("CONNECT_SERVER", ""))
publisher_key  <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_API_KEY", "")

config <- tryCatch(
  jsonlite::read_json("collection.json", simplifyVector = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("No collection.json: ", e$message); list() }
)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| context: server
#| label: server-grid

# Per-session: mint a viewer-scoped key and fetch only items the viewer
# has access to. Items the viewer cannot see return NULL from
# get_content() (which swallows 403/404), and we filter NULLs out.
# Tag-based collections use /v1/search/content, which is already
# permission-scoped server-side.
output$collection_grid <- renderUI({
  key <- visitor_api_key(session, connect_server, publisher_key)

  source_type <- config$source_type %||% "manual"
  items <- if (identical(source_type, "tag") &&
               nzchar(config$source_tag %||% "")) {
    fetch_content_by_tag(connect_server, key, config$source_tag)
  } else {
    lapply(config$guids %||% character(0),
           function(g) get_content(connect_server, key, g))
  }
  items <- Filter(Negate(is.null), items)

  html <- if (length(items) == 0) {
    empty_state_html(config, THEME_COLORS)
  } else {
    build_collection_html(config, items, THEME_COLORS,
                          connect_server = connect_server,
                          include_chrome = FALSE)
  }
  htmltools::HTML(html)
})
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| label: knit-chrome

# Renders chrome statically at knit time. Quarto's default title block is
# hidden via CSS in this style block (the rules ship with the static HTML,
# not after Shiny boots, so they apply from page load).

knit_colors <- THEME_COLORS[[knit_config$theme %||% "minimal"]] %||% THEME_COLORS$minimal
knit_esc <- htmltools::htmlEscape
knit_title <- knit_config$title %||% ""
knit_description <- knit_config$description %||% ""
knit_intro <- knit_config$intro_markdown %||% ""

cat(sprintf('<style>
body { background-color: %s; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; margin: 0; }
.collection-header { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 2rem 0; }
.collection-title { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin: 0; }
.collection-description { margin-top: 0.25rem; color: #666; font-size: 1rem; }
.collection-intro { max-width: 960px; margin: 1.5rem auto; background: white; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1.25rem; border-left: 4px solid %s; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.6; }
.collection-intro h1, .collection-intro h2, .collection-intro h3 { margin-top: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; }
.collection-intro p { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.collection-intro a { color: %s; }

/* Hide Quarto chrome from page-load (these rules are part of the static
   HTML, not waiting for Shiny). */
#quarto-header, #quarto-footer, .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}
.cell, .cell-output, .cell-output-stdout, .cell-output-display,
.quarto-layout-row {
  margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; border: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important; box-shadow: none !important;
}
.cell:empty, .cell-output:empty { display: none !important; }

/* Loading state: while the grid output has no children, show a centered
   indicator. The pseudo-element disappears automatically the moment
   renderUI inserts content — no JavaScript event listeners required. */
#collection_grid:empty {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 50vh;
}
#collection_grid:empty::before {
  content: "Loading\\2026";
  color: #aaa;
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin-bottom: 6vh;
}
</style>
', knit_colors$bg, knit_colors$accent, knit_colors$accent))

cat(sprintf('<script>%s</script>\n', DATETIME_LOCALIZER_JS))

if (nzchar(knit_title) || nzchar(knit_description)) {
  cat('<div class="collection-header">\n')
  if (nzchar(knit_title)) {
    cat(sprintf('<h1 class="collection-title">%s</h1>\n',
                knit_esc(knit_title)))
  }
  if (nzchar(knit_description)) {
    cat(sprintf('<p class="collection-description">%s</p>\n',
                knit_esc(knit_description)))
  }
  cat('</div>\n')
}

if (nzchar(knit_intro)) {
  intro_html <- markdown::markdownToHTML(text = knit_intro, fragment.only = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf('<div class="collection-intro">%s</div>\n', intro_html))
}
```

::: {.collection-grid-container}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: ui-grid
uiOutput("collection_grid")
```
:::
